data.title: Pharmacies can save employers millions by providing convenient healthcare access, reducing costs. Study in Arlington.
data.description: A recent nationwide study revealed that pharmacy-based care has significantly reduced costs for American employers while meeting the increasing demand from workers for convenient access to healthcare. The study, conducted in Arlington, Virginia, found that by expanding pharmacy services, employers were able to cut healthcare expenses while satisfying employees' desire for improved healthcare access. This finding highlights the effectiveness of pharmacy-based care in addressing both cost concerns and the need for convenient healthcare services. The study was conducted on October 16, 2025, and provides valuable insights into the benefits of incorporating pharmacies into healthcare solutions.

data.title: Service Corporation International (NYSE:SCI) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 29, followed by conference call on Oct 30.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Service Corporation International (NYSE: SCI) declared its plans to release financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on October 29. A conference call led by SCI Management is scheduled for October 30...

data.title: Domino's is partnering with St. Jude Children's Research Hospital for the Thanks and Giving campaign.
data.description: In Ann Arbor, Michigan on October 16, 2025, Domino's Pizza Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) announced the launch of the St. Jude Giving Combo as part of their support for the St. Jude Thanks and Giving® campaign. Customers have the option to purchase this combo, donate additional funds, or round up their total purchase to contribute to the cause. Domino's has been a longstanding supporter of St. Jude Children's Research, emphasizing their commitment to giving back.

data.title: KBR declares $0.165 quarterly dividend per share to be paid on Jan 15, 2026, to stockholders of record on Dec 15, 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, KBR revealed the declaration of a regular quarterly dividend of $0.165 per share for its common stock with a par value of $0.001 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on January 15, 2026, to stockholders who are on record as of December 15, 2025.

data.title: S&T Bank President David Antolik wins 2025 C-Suite Award by Pittsburgh Business Times. #Leader #AwardWinner
data.description: In Indiana, Pennsylvania on October 16, 2025, S&T Bank, which is a wholly owned subsidiary of S&T Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: STBA), proudly revealed that David Antolik, the president, has been named a recipient of the 2025 C-Suite award by the Pittsburgh Business Times. The C-Suite Awards highlights outstanding executives in the region for their exemplary performance and leadership qualities.

data.title: TASE to release third quarter 2025 results on Nov 11 after market close. Tel Aviv Stock Exchange Ltd (TASE: TASE).
data.description: Tel Aviv Stock Exchange Ltd, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, with the ticker symbol TASE, has revealed that its financial reports for the period until September 30, 2025, are scheduled to be released on November 11, 2025, post the market closure. Investors can look forward to gaining insights into the company's performance by reviewing these financial statements, which will provide vital information for the specified period. Stay tuned for the detailed financial updates from TASE by mid-November.

data.title: Taco Bell introduces Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito, a spicy and cheesy innovation. Feed your fiery side!
data.description: Introducing Taco Bell's latest creation, the Flamin' Hot® Grilled Cheese Burrito! Designed for flavor enthusiasts, this bold dish combines cheesy goodness with spicy kick. Embark on a flavorful journey with this new innovation, bringing together iconic flavors in Taco Bell's signature style. Unleash your fiery side and indulge in the deliciously daring Flamin' Hot® Grilled Cheese Burrito today.

data.title: Nasdaq leads gains as Nvidia chipmaker jumps; Taiwan Semiconductor and Snowflake in focus. Dow Jones rose on Thursday.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase, with Taiwan Semiconductor, a chipmaker for Nvidia, surging on positive earnings. The Nasdaq led gains in the stock market. Specifically, Taiwan Semiconductor's jump was notable among the news of the day. Snowflake also made headlines with its entry into the market. These updates were covered live by Investor's Business Daily, providing real-time information on the stock market trends.

data.title: GDT named 2025 IoT Innovator by CRN for outstanding contributions to enterprise IoT market.
data.description: In Dallas on October 16, 2025, GDT revealed it was recognized as one of CRN's 2025 IoT Innovators, showcasing its significant impact on the enterprise Internet of Things (IoT) market. This accolade celebrates solution providers like GDT for their outstanding contributions.
